          "query": "MATCH (d:SPEC_200)<-[w:ASSOCIATED_SPEC200]-(p:SPEC)<-[:ASSOCIATED_SPEC]-(g:GUIDE)-[r:HAVING_SERIES]->(s:SERIES)\n//-[f:HAVING_MODEL_NUMBER]->(m:MODEL_NUMBER)\n\nWHERE  d.Spec_200 = $neodash_spec_200_spec_200\n\nreturn g.GH_ID As GH_ID,d.Spec_200,p.Spec AS Spec,s.Series As Series,g.PPR1_Guide_Limit AS Guide_Limit//,r.Quantity As Demand//,m.Model_Number\n,g.Guide_Description As Guide_Description,g.Guide_Type AS Guide_Type//((g.PPR1_Guide_Limit-r.Quantity)*-1) AS Exceed_Demand",

        {
          "id": "b4c684fd-29e2-45d4-b1ba-69d6b7364b66",
          "title": "Guides Operating Under Demand Volume",
          "query": "// MATCH (p:SPEC)<-[:ASSOCIATED_SPEC]-(g:GUIDE)-[r:HAVING_SERIES]->(s:SERIES)\n\n// WITH g,p,s,r,\n//      CASE \n//        WHEN r.Quantity < g.PPR1_Guide_Limit THEN true\n  \n//        ELSE false \n//      END AS DemandStatus\n// WITH g,p,s,r,DemandStatus\n// WHERE DemandStatus = true \n// return g.GH_ID As GH_ID,p.Spec AS Spec,s.Series As Series,\n// g.Guide_Description As Guide_Description,g.Guide_Type AS Guide_Type,g.Guide_limit_type AS Limit_Type,(g.PPR1_Guide_Limit-r.Quantity) AS Aval_Demand\n// order by  Aval_Demand ASC\n\nMATCH (g:GUIDE)-[r:HAVING_SERIES]->(s:SERIES)\nWHERE s.Series = $neodash_series_series\n\nMATCH (g)-[:ASSOCIATED_SPEC]->(p:SPEC)\n\nWITH g, p, s, r,\n     CASE \n       WHEN r.Quantity < g.PPR1_Guide_Limit THEN true\n       ELSE false \n     END AS DemandStatus\n\nWITH g, p, s, r, DemandStatus\nWHERE DemandStatus = true \n\nRETURN \n  g.GH_ID AS GH_ID,\n  p.Spec AS Spec,\n  s.Series AS Series,\n  g.Guide_Description AS Guide_Description,\n  g.Guide_Type AS Guide_Type,\n  g.Guide_limit_type AS Limit_Type,\n  (g.PPR1_Guide_Limit - r.Quantity) AS Aval_Demand\n\nORDER BY Aval_Demand ASC\n\n\n",
          "settingsOpen": false,
          "advancedSettingsOpen": true,
          "width": 20,
          "height": 3,
          "x": 0,
          "y": 18,
          "type": "table",
          "fields": [
            "GH_ID",
            "Spec",
            "Series",
            "Guide_Description",
            "Guide_Type",
            "Limit_Type",
            "Aval_Demand"

          "id": "c11cc278-adf3-4200-8fd6-2c9b570a83ed",
          "title": "Guide Limit vs Demand for Specs in Selected SPEC_200",
          "query": "// Step 1: Accept one SPEC_200 string input\nWITH $neodash_spec_200_spec_200 AS specStr\n\n// Step 2: Split into 200 characters\nWITH apoc.text.split(specStr, \"\") AS chars\n\n// Step 3: Tag each character with its position (1–200)\nWITH [i IN range(0,199) | {position: i + 1, char: chars[i]}] AS posList\nUNWIND posList AS pc\nWITH pc\nWHERE pc.char <> \" \"  // Ignore blank characters\n\n// Step 4: Build specKey like 009J, 010C, 124B\nWITH CASE\n  WHEN pc.position < 10 THEN '00' + toString(pc.position)\n  WHEN pc.position < 100 THEN '0' + toString(pc.position)\n  ELSE toString(pc.position)\nEND + pc.char AS specKey\n\n// Step 5: Match SPEC → GUIDE only (no SPEC_200 join)\nMATCH (spec:SPEC {Spec: specKey})\nMATCH (guide:GUIDE)-[:ASSOCIATED_SPEC]->(spec)\n\n// Step 6: Optionally get demand from HAVING_SERIES\nOPTIONAL MATCH (guide)-[hs:HAVING_SERIES]->(:SERIES)\n\n// Step 7: Only include specs that have a guide with a limit\nWITH \n  spec.Spec AS specKey,\n  guide.GH_ID AS ghId,\n  guide.PPR1_Guide_Limit AS Guide_Limit,\n  coalesce(hs.Quantity, 0) AS Demand\nWHERE Guide_Limit IS NOT NULL\n\n// Step 8: Add⚠️ marker if Demand > Limit\nWITH specKey, ghId, Guide_Limit, Demand,\n     CASE \n       WHEN Demand > Guide_Limit THEN specKey + ' (' + ghId + ') ⚠️'\n       ELSE specKey + ' (' + ghId + ')'\n     END AS displayLabel\n\n// Step 9: Format for grouped bar chart\nWITH [\n  {spec: displayLabel, series: 'Guide Limit', value: Guide_Limit},\n  {spec: displayLabel, series: 'Demand', value: Demand}\n] AS barRows\nUNWIND barRows AS row\n\n// Step 10: Return for NeoDash chart\nRETURN row.spec AS spec, row.series AS series, row.value AS value\nORDER BY spec\n",
